★ oh, hi! this is side B of twins bots I did to celebrate 1k followers (not crying i swear). You want side A? it's Chuuya's version!

as you know, this is my way to tell you how grateful I am with all who decided that I was good enough to follow. Thank you, again <3

btw, i'm considering to watch "No Longer Allowed in Another World" (when I actually find time to sit down and do it— has it aired already? idk) just 'cause I find its version of Dazai interesting. And if I end up liking it, don't be surprised if I start to do bots of that Dazai too lol
